---
title: "Eric Wong"
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/eric~wong/
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/Eric-Wong97
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:eric97wong@gmail.com
---

I am a **Master of Data Science** student at the University of British Columbia, specializing in machine learning, cloud computing, and data strategy.

## Technical Skills

| Category | Skills |
|----------|--------|
| **Languages** | Python (Pandas, NumPy, Scikit-learn, PyTorch), SQL, R, VBA |
| **Cloud & DevOps** | Azure (Synapse, Data Factory), AWS, Docker, CI/CD, Git |
| **Databases** | PostgreSQL, MongoDB |
| **Visualization** | PowerBI, Tableau, Seaborn, Altair, Looker |
